title: Device Home Screen - Device Onboarding Screens
scenario: Verify the full onboarding flow for first-time connected devices (Osprey/Tern/Emu), including welcome popup, navigation, content alignment, fit test, and completion for both single and second paired devices.
steps: Connect a supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) for the first time.
Observe that the welcome popup is displayed.
Navigate through onboarding screens using swipe gestures or navigation buttons.
Verify that content and animations match the Figma designs.
Test the fit test functionality, checking both pass and fail states.
Complete the onboarding flow by tapping either the 'Done' or 'User Guide' button.
Pair and connect a second supported device.
Verify that onboarding screens are displayed for the second device as well.
expected: Onboarding screens are displayed for each supported device (Osprey/Tern/Emu) when connected for the first time. The full flow works correctly: welcome popup appears, navigation via swiping or buttons functions, content and animations match Figma designs, fit test handles pass/fail states, and completion via 'Done' or 'User Guide' buttons works. Onboarding also triggers correctly for a second paired device.
